---
name: 🏝️ Cultural Content Review
about: Report issues with cultural accuracy or suggest cultural content improvements
title: '[CULTURAL] '
labels: ['cultural-content', 'needs-review', 'community']
assignees: ''
---

## 🏝️ Cultural Content Type
**What type of cultural content does this relate to?**

**Language Content:**
- [ ] 🗣️ Pronunciation/Audio
- [ ] 📝 Written text/translations
- [ ] 📚 Vocabulary/phrases
- [ ] 🎭 Expressions/idioms
- [ ] 📖 Grammar explanations

**Cultural Content:**
- [ ] 📜 Traditional stories/legends
- [ ] 🎵 Songs/chants
- [ ] 🎨 Art/visual representations
- [ ] 🏛️ Historical information
- [ ] 🎭 Cultural practices/customs
- [ ] 🍽️ Food/cooking traditions
- [ ] 🌺 Traditional crafts/skills

**Educational Content:**
- [ ] 🎓 Lesson structure/progression
- [ ] 📊 Assessment methods
- [ ] 🎯 Learning objectives
- [ ] 📱 Interactive elements

## 🔍 Issue Description
**Describe the cultural content issue:**

**Current Content:**
- Location in app: [e.g. Lesson 3, Cultural Stories section, Community post]
- Specific content: [Quote or describe the content in question]
- Source/attribution: [If known, where did this content come from?]

**Issue Type:**
- [ ] ❌ Culturally inaccurate information
- [ ] 🚫 Inappropriate cultural representation
- [ ] ❓ Missing cultural context
- [ ] 🔤 Incorrect language usage
- [ ] 📢 Mispronunciation/incorrect audio
- [ ] 🎭 Misrepresented cultural practice
- [ ] 📅 Outdated cultural information
- [ ] 🌍 Regional variation not acknowledged

## 🎯 Suggested Correction
**What should be changed or improved?**

**Accurate Information:**
- Correct content: [Provide the accurate information]
- Cultural context: [Explain the proper cultural context]
- Regional considerations: [Note any regional variations]
- Traditional vs. modern usage: [If applicable]

**Sources:**
- Cultural authority: [Elder, cultural expert, institution]
- Reference materials: [Books, academic papers, official sources]
- Community validation: [Has this been reviewed by native speakers?]

## 👥 Cultural Authority
**Who can validate this content?**

**Community Connections:**
- [ ] I am a native Tahitian speaker
- [ ] I am a cultural practitioner
- [ ] I have consulted with native speakers
- [ ] I have academic expertise in Polynesian culture
- [ ] I have lived in French Polynesia
- [ ] I am a certified Tahitian language teacher

**Suggested Reviewers:**
- Cultural expert to contact: [Name/organization if known]
- Community member who can verify: [If applicable]
- Academic source: [University, research institution]

## 🌍 Regional Context
**Cultural and regional considerations:**

**Geographic Specificity:**
- [ ] 🏝️ Tahiti (Windward Islands)
- [ ] 🏝️ Moorea (Windward Islands)
- [ ] 🏝️ Bora Bora (Leeward Islands)
- [ ] 🏝️ Raiatea (Leeward Islands)
- [ ] 🏝️ Marquesas Islands
- [ ] 🏝️ Tuamotu Archipelago
- [ ] 🏝️ Austral Islands
- [ ] 🌐 General Polynesian culture

**Cultural Sensitivity Level:**
- [ ] 🟢 General cultural information
- [ ] 🟡 Sensitive cultural practice
- [ ] 🟠 Sacred/traditional knowledge
- [ ] 🔴 Highly sacred/restricted content

## 📚 Educational Impact
**How does this affect language learning?**

**Learning Outcomes:**
- Impact on pronunciation: [How does this affect proper pronunciation?]
- Cultural understanding: [What cultural concepts are involved?]
- Language progression: [How does this fit into the learning path?]

**Student Confusion:**
- [ ] May cause pronunciation errors
- [ ] Could lead to cultural misunderstanding
- [ ] Might perpetuate stereotypes
- [ ] Could offend native speakers
- [ ] May confuse language learners

## 🤝 Community Collaboration
**How can the community help?**

**Collaboration Needs:**
- [ ] Native speaker review required
- [ ] Cultural expert consultation needed
- [ ] Community discussion recommended
- [ ] Academic research required
- [ ] Multiple regional perspectives needed

**Community Resources:**
- Existing community connections: [Any relevant contacts]
- Cultural organizations: [Local cultural groups, language preservation societies]
- Educational institutions: [Universities, cultural centers]

## 📊 Priority Level
- [ ] 🔴 Critical - Culturally offensive or highly inaccurate
- [ ] 🟠 High - Significantly impacts cultural understanding
- [ ] 🟡 Medium - Minor inaccuracy, should be corrected
- [ ] 🟢 Low - Enhancement or additional context

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] I have researched this cultural content thoroughly
- [ ] I have considered regional variations
- [ ] I have identified appropriate cultural authorities
- [ ] I have considered the educational impact
- [ ] I have suggested specific improvements
- [ ] I have indicated my cultural connection/authority
- [ ] I understand this content may require community review
